113:11.notes: Treat John Paul I's death as a one-off actor-specific event during the short pontificate that began with his election.

113:7.notes: Treat the Luciani election as a one-off conclave event during the sede vacante following Paul VI's death.

113:8.notes: Treat the Luciani election as the same one-off conclave event for the duplicate row that names the exact Saturday date.

555:1.notes: Treat the Bergoglio election as a one-off conclave event in the window between Benedict XVI's resignation announcement and the actual election.

829:17.notes: Treat Benedict XVI's death as a one-off actor-specific event during the period from his resignation to his death.

459:4.notes: Treat the apology as a one-off actor-specific government action that could have landed on any day of Kevin Rudd's first prime-ministerial term.

459:5.notes: Treat the declaration as a one-off jurisdiction-specific statehood event within the post-war Kosovo status process.

459:6.notes: Treat the resignation announcement as a one-off actor-specific transition event within the interval between Fidel Castro's provisional power transfer and his formal resignation message.

136:16.notes: Treat Reagan's election as a one-off actor-specific event during the general-election period after he secured the Republican nomination.

136:113.notes: Treat the Reagan assassination attempt as a one-off actor-specific violent event during the opening months of his presidency.

136:213.notes: Treat the shorter Reagan-assassination claim as the same one-off March 1981 violent event window.

136:143.notes: Treat Mitterrand's election as a one-off actor-specific presidential runoff result during the 1981 French election window.

136:157.notes: Treat the 13 May 1981 assassination attempt on John Paul II as a one-off actor-specific violent event during his early pontificate.

136:53.notes: Treat Reagan's selection of Alexander Haig as a one-off cabinet-appointment event during the transition between the 1980 election and Haig's assumption of office.

217:3.notes: Treat Switzerland's UN entry as a one-off jurisdiction-specific membership event over the post-prediction accession process.

436:12.notes: Treat the 2006 House majority flip as a one-off party-control event during the final stretch of the midterm election campaign.

448:9.notes: Treat Blair's resignation announcement as a one-off actor-specific transition event during the final two weeks before the 10 May 2007 announcement.
